nodes.norm_label: note: this file should not be edited

nodes.label: Pull Request Template and Checklist
nodes.rationale: Gates merges on pnpm test/lint/typecheck passing, no committed secrets, and PRs scoped to one concern (no mixing features with refactors).

nodes.label: Local Development Setup
nodes.rationale: AI uses the local Claude Code CLI so no API key is needed; Postgres and Redis run via Docker Compose; apps serve at web:3000 and api:8000.

nodes.label: Trunk-Based Branch Strategy
nodes.rationale: Trunk-based development with short-lived typed feature branches; main requires PR + 1 approval + passing CI with no direct pushes, and feature branches squash-merge to keep main history clean.

nodes.label: Code Review Process
nodes.rationale: PRs stay under ~400 changed lines and one logical change; reviewers respond within 1 business day and mark comments [BLOCKING]/[OPTIONAL]/[NIT]; the author (not the reviewer) merges after approval.

nodes.label: CI/CD Pipeline
nodes.rationale: push/PR triggers lint -> typecheck -> test -> build, all merge-blocking; main pushes additionally deploy to staging followed by a smoke test.

nodes.label: Semver Release Process
nodes.rationale: Pushing a version tag drives release.yml, which builds, deploys to production, and creates a GitHub Release; hotfixes branch off main, skip develop, and tag a patch immediately after merge.

nodes.label: Testing Standards
nodes.rationale: Vitest for unit/integration, Playwright for E2E; minimum 60% coverage on core modules, new features ship with tests, bug fixes include a regression test.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL + pgvector Service
nodes.rationale: Uses the pgvector/pgvector:pg16 image, implying vector similarity search (embeddings) is part of the local data stack.

nodes.label: pnpm Workspace Monorepo Layout
nodes.rationale: Packages live under apps/* and packages/*, the structure that enables pnpm --filter commands like @sultan-saif/db migrations.

links.source_location: same pnpm test/lint/typecheck gates as the CI pipeline
